name: ragtime
description: RAG bake-off arena: compare embedding, rerank, and generation models via Render Workflows and OpenRouter

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @ragtime/core --filter @ragtime/db --filter @ragtime/gateway-openrouter build && node --test packages/core/test/*.test.mjs packages/db/test/*.test.mjs packages/gateway-openrouter/test/*.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @ragtime/web exec tsx --test test/run-plan.test.ts test/score-display.test.ts
scripts.smoke: if [ -n "$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" ]; then pnpm --filter @ragtime/gateway-openrouter smoke; else echo 'Skipping OpenRouter smoke (no OPENROUTER_API_KEY)'; fi
